title: AntiXray Remasterd
description: Antixray and alot of other features
body:
Core Features:

Anti-Xray / Ore Obfuscation

Randomize ore/block visibility for players until they’re in proximity or interact with the block.

Make it impossible for players to locate ores using X-ray texture packs.

 Detect suspicious mining patterns and flag possible X-ray users.

Anti-ESP (Chests, Entities, Health Indicators)

Prevent mods from revealing hidden chests, player locations, or health data.

Only send entity/block metadata when the player has legitimate line-of-sight or proximity.

Detect abnormal behavior like targeting invisible or low-health players.

Anti-Minimap Exploits

Limit chunk and world data sent to players to prevent map mods from rendering unexplored areas.

Optional: Detect and limit fast or automated exploration that indicates minimap hacks.

Detection & Logging

Flag suspicious activity and log for review.

 Send alerts to admins when potential ESP/X-ray cheats are detected.
